meaning: adj.没有篱笆的,没有防备的
examples: Copy the SQPLTRC executable into sqllib \ function \ unfenced.
To resolve the problem, run UDF in an unfenced mode or reduce database Shared memory set to no more than 5 segments.
But most of the world's elephants live in unfenced, poorly guarded habitats.
There gullies on the four rivers that vein the reservation's 930, 000 unfenced hectares attract antelope, mule and whitetail deer, turkey, coyote and grouse.
Remember that zones are unfenced, so wolves will move between them.
